title: Battle of Iridonia (disambiguation)
content:
There were four battles known as the '''Battle of Iridonia''':
*The [[First Battle of Iridonia]], fought during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].
*The [[First battle of Iridonia (Mandalorian Wars)|first battle]] fought during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].
*The [[Second battle of Iridonia (Mandalorian Wars)|second battle]] fought during the Mandalorian Wars.
*The [[Battle of Iridonia (Jedi Civil War)|Battle of Iridonia]], fought during the [[Jedi Civil War]]
*The [[Second battle of Iridonia (Jedi Civil War)|second battle]] fought during the Jedi Civil War.
*The [[Battle of the Iridonia system]] fought during the [[Fifth Alsakan Conflict]].

{{Disambig}}
